nasb.text: and of the sons of Adonikam, the last ones, these being their names, Eliphelet, Jeuel and Shemaiah, and 60 males with them;

esv.text: Of the sons of Adonikam, those who came later, their names being Eliphelet, Jeuel, and Shemaiah, and with them 60 men.

cnv.text: 屬亞多尼干的子孫，就是最後的，他們的名字是：以利法列、耶利和示瑪雅，與他們在一起的男丁有六十人。

ccb.text: 稍后归回的亚多尼干的子孙有以利法列、耶利、示玛雅及六十名男子；
